title: error using DROP COLUMN in ALTER TABLE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO test (id, name, age) VALUES (2, NULL, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_temp AS SELECT id, age FROM test;
ALTER TABLE test_temp RENAME TO test;
key_bug_features: DROP COLUMN in ALTER TABLE causes error
